title: Regional Energy Distribution Utility – Simulated Case Study
description: A simulated mid-sized regional energy distribution utility operating critical infrastructure for electricity distribution across a metropolitan area. The organisation processes personal data of approximately 150,000 residential and commercial customers and operates both IT and OT (operational technology) environments.

scope_of_assessment.description: The assessment covers the organisation's IT governance environment, focusing on corporate IT systems (not OT/SCADA). The scope includes access management, incident response capabilities, data protection practices, vulnerability management, and security governance.
exclusions: OT/SCADA-specific controls (out of scope for this prototype)
Supply chain security (beyond basic vendor risk)

notes: All data in this case study is synthetic and created for thesis demonstration purposes only. No real organisation or individual is represented.
